headline: Stocks to Watch Friday: Lumentum, Coherent, Porsche
summary: ↗️ Lumentum (LITE), Coherent (COHR), Corning (GLW): Makers of optical equipment gained premarket after Bloomberg reported that Lumentum is seeing strong AI-related demand. JPMorgan analysts also raised their price targets for Lumentum and Coherent, both of which are backed by Nvidia (NVDA).
